findings_summary.notes: CRITICAL: The repo_url path (computer-forensics-skills/skills/file-deletion) does not exist in the mhattingpete/claude-skills-marketplace repository. The repository has no computer-forensics-skills directory at any point in its commit history (CHANGELOG shows only engineering-workflow, visual-documentation, productivity-skills, and code-operations plugins). The skill record references a non-existent path and has no SKILL.md to verify. The actual star count for the parent repo is 406, not 350 as recorded. This skill cannot be verified because the referenced source path is fabricated or the skill was incorrectly catalogued against the wrong repository. High risk classification is assigned due to unverifiable provenance.

scan_summary: SOURCE PATH DOES NOT EXIST. computer-forensics-skills/ directory never existed in mhattingpete/claude-skills-marketplace. Skill cannot be verified. Stale/incorrect metadata.
